message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,8 +83,8 @@
 {"id":"bd-56t.2","title":"Create release verification and rollback runbook","description":"Background:
Operational users need deterministic post-release validation and safe rollback procedures.

Subtasks:
- Define verification checklist for artifact presence, signatures, and smoke tests.
- Require release-candidate e2e runs (kernel lifecycle, codec equivalence, profile parity, restart continuity, vertical HFT/automotive/router lanes) with archived manifests.
- Define rollback triggers and rollback procedure by release class.
- Define incident-response references for replay/conformance validation post-deploy.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Runbook enables repeatable release validation by any maintainer.
- Rollback path is fast and tested in at least one dry run.
- Includes profile-specific smoke verification guidance.
- Release approval requires complete structured logs and artifact manifests from required e2e runs.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.218832958Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T02:22:06.542112478Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ops","release","runbook"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.962342960Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.18","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T02:21:45.106946473Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:31.745702980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.218832958Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-56t.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.482302143Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.570376359Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.2","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T02:21:45.206559902Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-56t.3","title":"Create certification-ready evidence bundle skeletons and mapping templates","description":"Background:
Safety-critical and regulated adopters require structured evidence linking claims to artifacts.

Subtasks:
- Define bundle structure for invariants, tests, conformance, and gate evidence.
- Define mapping templates for standards-oriented documentation (for example ISO-style traceability needs).
- Link bundle sections to traceability index and CI artifact IDs.
- Include canonical pointers to unit/invariant/e2e structured logs, run manifests, parity diffs, and replay bundles.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Bundle skeleton is complete enough for audited release candidates.
- Mappings are explicit and reproducible from repository artifacts.
- No claim exists without a documented evidence location.
- Evidence bundle is sufficient for third-party audit replay of key failures and mitigations.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.307747108Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:06:22.964551549Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["certification","evidence","release"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:53.062583122Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:31.837567889Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-296.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:57:42.044551827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-296.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:57:42.290886579Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-296.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.746021497Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.307747108Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:14.655414164Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.3","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:06:22.964499662Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-56t.4","title":"Define C API/ABI stability contract and versioned compatibility process","description":"Background:
C API/ABI stability is adoption-critical, especially for embedded integrators and long-lived deployments.

Subtasks:
- Define public API versioning macros (`ASX_API_VERSION_MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH`) and compatibility policy.
- Define symbol-visibility and header hygiene rules for static/dynamic portability.
- Define config-struct evolution rules (size-field pattern vs frozen structs).
- Implement consumer-shim CI job that compiles against public headers only.
- Define deprecation/migration documentation requirements and release checklist integration.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Stability contract is explicit, versioned, and visible to integrators.
- ABI break detection/check process is enforceable in CI/release workflow.
- Breaking-change process and migration notes requirements are unambiguous.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:20.138071538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:30:12.043243277Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["abi","api","compatibility","release"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-296.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:21.915600362Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:20.138071538Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-56t.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.733977869Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:52:22.013599177Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.4","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.16","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:30:12.043194365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-56t.5","title":"Run API ergonomics validation gate with compilable usage vignettes","description":"Background:
Plan section 7.3.2 adds a pre-lock API usability gate to avoid shipping semantically-correct but hostile C APIs.

Subtasks:
- Implement 3-5 compilable vignette programs covering lifecycle, obligations, budgets, replay, and freestanding hooks.
- Measure boilerplate/footgun burden and discoverability per vignette.
- Propose header/API adjustments where ergonomics are unnecessarily poor.
- Record final ergonomics decision and rationale in API docs before header freeze.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Vignettes compile and run in CI against public headers.
- Ergonomics findings are documented with actionable outcomes.
- Public header freeze cannot proceed without explicit ergonomics sign-off.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:05.468931266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.643628070Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","api","docs","ergonomics"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-296.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.643578698Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:05.468931266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.263714366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.453356238Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.550543086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.359251093Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-66l","title":"EPIC: Hard Quality Gates and CI Enforcement","description":"Background:
The plan defines non-negotiable gates. They must be automated and enforced to prevent regressions from entering mainline.

Goal:
Encode all required gates in CI with reproducible artifacts and clear fail reasons.

Gates include:
- portability, OOM semantics, fuzz parity
- embedded matrix, profile parity, semantic-delta budget
- HFT tail/jitter, automotive deadline/watchdog
- crash/restart replay continuity
- warning/static-analysis/bounded-proof gates

Why this serves users:
- transforms policy into enforceable guarantees
- makes trust scalable beyond individual reviewers.

Cross-cutting quality contract:
- Child tasks must define and link unit tests, e2e script coverage (when behavioral), and structured log/manifest artifacts or explicit rationale for non-applicability.
- Completion evidence must remain compatible with bd-66l.9 enforcement and traceability index expectations.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:47:42.390018086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T03:53:43.537481503Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","phase-10","quality-gates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-1md","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T02:07:48.810882339Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-296","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:04.009206710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:42.903022003Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:43.001949543Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:42.803058142Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:04.109741681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:43.107607121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Conformance now executes under rch with SEMANTIC_DELTA_ARTIFACT_DIR override support in tools/ci/run_conformance.sh; remaining fail is existing semantic-delta non-budgetable condition.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:05.468931266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T07:42:11.300924231Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","api","docs","ergonomics"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-296.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.643578698Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-56t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:05.468931266Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.263714366Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.453356238Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.14","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.550543086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-56t.5","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:57.359251093Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-66l","title":"EPIC: Hard Quality Gates and CI Enforcement","description":"Background:
The plan defines non-negotiable gates. They must be automated and enforced to prevent regressions from entering mainline.

Goal:
Encode all required gates in CI with reproducible artifacts and clear fail reasons.

Gates include:
- portability, OOM semantics, fuzz parity
- embedded matrix, profile parity, semantic-delta budget
- HFT tail/jitter, automotive deadline/watchdog
- crash/restart replay continuity
- warning/static-analysis/bounded-proof gates

Why this serves users:
- transforms policy into enforceable guarantees
- makes trust scalable beyond individual reviewers.

Cross-cutting quality contract:
- Child tasks must define and link unit tests, e2e script coverage (when behavioral), and structured log/manifest artifacts or explicit rationale for non-applicability.
- Completion evidence must remain compatible with bd-66l.9 enforcement and traceability index expectations.","notes":"Executed API ergonomics validation lane work (bd-56t.5 content) under this quality-gate epic: added make test-vignettes target, CI step+manifest wiring, tests/TEST.md vignette coverage docs, docs/API_ERGONOMICS_VALIDATION.md sign-off, and fixed vignette compile/runtime issues. Validation via rch: make test-vignettes/build/format-check/lint/test pass. Conformance now runs under rch with SEMANTIC_DELTA_ARTIFACT_DIR override support in tools/ci/run_conformance.sh; current remote conformance still fails on existing non-budgetable semantic-delta condition (fail=1, diff_records=1), not a permission failure.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"IvoryGlacier","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:47:42.390018086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T07:39:39.033338772Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","phase-10","quality-gates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-1md","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T02:07:48.810882339Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-296","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:04.009206710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-2cw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:42.903022003Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-2n0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:43.001949543Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:42.803058142Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:04.109741681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l","depends_on_id":"bd-j4m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:14:43.107607121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.1","title":"Implement CI workflow matrix for build, tests, conformance, profiles, fuzz, embedded, and perf","description":"Background:
Quality policy is only real when encoded in CI. Workflow structure must mirror plan-gate structure.

Subtasks:
- Define jobs for check, unit-invariant, conformance, profile-parity, fuzz-parity, embedded-matrix, perf-tail-deadline, and e2e scenario packs.
- Ensure deterministic artifact naming and retention.
- Ensure failure output is actionable and machine-readable where possible.
- Enforce publication of test run manifests and first-failure summaries for each test lane.

Acceptance Criteria:
- CI runs all required jobs on expected triggers.
- Job outputs are sufficient for triage without rerunning everything locally.
- No critical gate is left as manual-only.
- Missing e2e artifacts/manifests fail the workflow.","notes":"2026-02-28: Completed CI workflow hardening for lane manifests/first-failure summaries and deterministic artifact naming. Updated .github/workflows/ci.yml and perf.yml: added per-lane machine-readable manifest emission (build/ci-manifests/*.manifest.json), e2e run_manifest publication enforcement, conformance/profile summary presence checks, fuzz/embedded artifact validation, lint-docs in check lane, deterministic artifact names using github.run_id/run_attempt. Verification via rch offload: make format-check, lint, build, test, conformance, profile-parity all PASS.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"FrostyPrairie","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.106194478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T01:21:14.302625020Z","closed_at":"2026-02-28T01:21:14.302597949Z","close_reason":"Implemented CI/perf workflow matrix refinements, deterministic artifact naming, lane manifest + first-failure summaries, and manifest/artifact enforcement checks.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","gates","workflows"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.462598810Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:01:52.554834254Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1md.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.535271692Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.106194478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T00:51:00.449842343Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.10","title":"Implement section 10.7 warning/static-analysis/bounded-model gates","description":"Background:
Plan section 10.7 adds mandatory gates replacing lost Rust compiler guarantees in core kernel paths.

Subtasks:
- Enforce warning-as-error policy across GCC/Clang/MSVC with curated high-signal flags.
- Add static-analyzer job and triage policy (must-fix/waiver/backlog) wired into CI outcomes.
- Add bounded model-check job for small-state transition/cancellation/double-resolve properties.
- Publish rerun commands and artifact expectations for each gate in CI docs.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Section 10.7 gates run automatically and fail correctly on violations.
- Analyzer waivers are explicit, justified, and auditable.
- Bounded-model artifacts are reproducible and attached to failing runs.","notes":"Section 10.7 gates implemented: (1) tools/ci/run_static_analysis.sh — cppcheck + clang-tidy with ASX_ANALYZER_WAIVER support, JSON reporting; (2) tests/invariant/model_check/test_bounded_model.c — 19 tests over 10 invariants (terminal, forward progress, cancel monotonicity, obligation linearity, spawn prohibition, table completeness, terminal predicates, cancel severity, state names, reachability); (3) Makefile targets: lint-static-analysis, model-check; (4) CI integration in .github/workflows/ci.yml","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:24:59.775986492Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-28T03:21:14.253538281Z","closed_at":"2026-02-28T03:21:14.253468431Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","formal","lint","static-analysis"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-296.29","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:27:01.142617520Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-66l","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:24:59.775986492Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-66l.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.061941009Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-hwb.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.235866045Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-66l.10","depends_on_id":"bd-ix8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T01:25:51.148635159Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-66l.2","title":"Encode and enforce full hard quality gate pack from plan section 10.6","description":"Background:
The hard gates are the anti-regression backbone and must include both section 10.6 semantic gates and section 10.7 static/proof gates.

Subtasks:
- Enforce portability matrix, strict exhaustion semantics, differential fuzzing/minimization, embedded matrix, profile parity, tail/jitter, deadline/watchdog, replay continuity, and semantic-delta gates.
- Enforce compiler warning-as-error policies (GCC/Clang/MSVC) and high-signal lint checks.
- Enforce static-analyzer triage policy (must-fix/waiver/backlog rules).
- Enforce bounded model-check job for small-state transition/cancellation/linearity properties.
- Enforce required unit/invariant/e2e script execution and structured manifest/log emission.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Every required gate has explicit pass/fail automation and artifact links.
- Gate failures provide deterministic rerun commands and evidence paths.
- No merge path bypasses mandatory gates unintentionally.
- Gate evaluation fails when required unit/invariant/e2e artifact schema is incomplete.","notes":"Hard quality-gate pack now encoded with explicit CI pass/fail lanes and artifacts. Evidence: Makefile targets cover format/lint/docs/checkpoint/static-analysis/anti-butchering/model-check/test/e2e suite/conformance/codec/profile-parity/fuzz/embedded matrix; .github/workflows/ci.yml check/unit-invariant/e2e/conformance/profile-parity jobs emit deterministic lane manifests with first-failure rerun commands; tools/ci/check_anti_butchering.sh added for semantic-sensitive proof-block enforcement with machine-readable artifact (build/conformance/anti_butcher_<run_id>.json); adapter isomorphism artifact integrated in profile-parity summary/artifact paths; deployment scenario packs validated via rch (router_storm, market_open_burst, automotive_fault_burst, run_all). Offloaded verification green via rch: make check, make conformance, make
